nodes.context: Marseille gang specializing in burglaries, hold-ups, and racketeering, active in the 1950s-1960s.
French organized crime milieu, involved in the murder of Antoine Guérini.
Marseille crime clan led by Antoine Guérini, involved in the Marseille underworld.
Russian organized crime group involved in a clandestine cigarette factory operation in Marseille.

edges.context: The Milieu supported the murder of Antoine Guérini, which was carried out by Imbert on Zampa's orders, with the Bande des Trois Canards involved.
The Milieu wanted revenge for the killing of Robert Blémant by the Guérini clan.
The Russian Mafia planned a cigarette factory operation with Imbert, a former member of the Bande des Trois Canards, as a key figure.
